# PERF-040-loop-demo negative: demo/main timing with for-loop is not a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-040-loop-demo-safe.go
---
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"time"
)

func main() {
	start := time.Now()
	for i := 1; i <= 3; i++ {
		elapsed := time.Since(start).Seconds()
		timestamp := time.Now().Format("15:04:05")
		fmt.Printf("[%s +%.1fs] tick %d\n", timestamp, elapsed, i)
		time.Sleep(10 * time.Millisecond)
	}
}
